name: FANUC 0i-F Plus CNC
description: FANUC 0i-F Plus数控系统，FOCAS2协议通信，支持坐标/速度/报警/程序信息采集

points.name: spindle_speed
points.description: 主轴转速，按加工程序阶梯切换：换刀归零，粗铣2000，半精铣4000，精铣6000

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 360
if t < 30: target = 0
elif t < 120: target = 2000
elif t < 150: target = 0
elif t < 240: target = 4000
elif t < 270: target = 0
else: target = 6000
noise = random.gauss(0, 8) if target > 0 else 0; result = round(max(0, target + noise), 1)

points.name: feed_rate
points.description: 进给速度，与加工工步联动：换刀时为0，粗铣800，半精铣500，精铣300

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 360
if t < 30: target = 0
elif t < 120: target = 800
elif t < 150: target = 0
elif t < 240: target = 500
elif t < 270: target = 0
else: target = 300
noise = random.gauss(0, 5) if target > 0 else 0; result = round(max(0, target + noise), 1)

points.name: spindle_current
points.description: 主轴电流，与工步联动：换刀时伺服保持电流约2.5A，粗铣18-24A，半精铣12-18A，精铣8-13A

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 360
if t < 30: base, noise_std = 2.5, 0.3
elif t < 120: base, noise_std = 21.0, 1.2
elif t < 150: base, noise_std = 2.5, 0.3
elif t < 240: base, noise_std = 15.0, 1.2
elif t < 270: base, noise_std = 2.5, 0.3
else: base, noise_std = 10.0, 1.2
result = round(max(0, base + random.gauss(0, noise_std)), 2)

elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 360
if t < 30: base = 0
elif t < 120: base = 52.0
elif t < 150: base = 0
elif t < 240: base = 42.0
elif t < 270: base = 0
else: base = 32.0
noise = random.gauss(0, 2.5) if base > 0 else 0; result = round(max(0, min(120.0, base + noise)), 2)

points.name: tool_number
points.description: 当前刀号，与工步联动：换刀阶段切换，粗铣T01，半精铣T02，精铣T03

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 360
if t < 120: result = 1
elif t < 240: result = 2
else: result = 3
